title: Entity Look At Entity Behavior
description: Compels an entity to look at a specific entity by rotating the `head` bone pose within a set limit.

angle_of_view_horizontal.title: Angle Of View Horizontal
angle_of_view_horizontal.description:
The angle in degrees that the mob can see rotated on the Y-axis (left-right).

Sample values:
• ravager: 45

angle_of_view_vertical.title: Angle Of View Vertical
angle_of_view_vertical.description: The angle in degrees that the mob can see rotated on the X-axis (up-down).

domain.title: Domain
domain.description: The domain the test should be performed in.

subject.title: Subject
subject.description: The subject of this filter test.

test.title: Test
test.description: The name of the test to apply.

value.title: Value
value.description: The value being compared with the test.

filters.title: Filters
filters.description:
Filter to determine the conditions for this mob to look at the entity

Sample values:
• evocation_illager: {"test":"is_family","subject":"other","value":"...

look_distance.title: Look Distance
look_distance.description:
The distance in blocks from which the entity will look at the nearest entity.

Sample values:
• evocation_illager: 8
• vex: 6

look_time.title: Look Time
look_time.description: Time range to look at the nearest entity.

priority.title: Priority
priority.description:
As priority approaches 0, the priority is increased. The higher the priority, the sooner this behavior will be executed as a goal.

Sample values:
• evocation_illager: 10
• vex: 9

probability.title: Probability
probability.description:
The probability of looking at the target. A value of 1.00 is 100%.

Sample values:
• vex: 0.02
